prompts.name: Clean Bright
prompts.text: Use clean bright lighting with high readability, soft contrast, and an open positive feeling.

prompts.name: Soft Romantic
prompts.text: Use soft romantic lighting with warm highlights, gentle shadows, and flattering emotional warmth.

prompts.name: Moody Cinematic
prompts.text: Use moody cinematic lighting with rich shadows and dramatic shape while keeping the subject readable.

prompts.name: Fairy Glow
prompts.text: Use delicate glowing light from magical plants, particles, or fantasy sources with gentle color.

prompts.name: Cool Morning
prompts.text: Use cool morning light with fresh blue shadows, soft highlights, and calm atmosphere.

prompts.name: Warm Lamp Light
prompts.text: Use warm indoor lamp light with cozy falloff, amber tones, and comfortable intimacy.

prompts.name: Backlit Halo
prompts.text: Use backlighting to create a soft halo around hair, shoulders, or silhouette while preserving face detail.

prompts.name: Split Lighting
prompts.text: Use split lighting with one side brighter and one side shadowed for drama and character depth.

prompts.name: Under Neon
prompts.text: Use neon lighting from signs or screens, with colorful reflections and stylish urban mood.

prompts.name: Cloud Diffused
prompts.text: Use cloud-diffused daylight with soft shadows, natural colors, and low harshness.

prompts.name: Fire Glow
prompts.text: Use warm fire glow with flickering highlights, orange tones, and soft moving shadows.

prompts.name: Cold Moon
prompts.text: Use cold moonlight with blue tones, silver highlights, and quiet nighttime atmosphere.

prompts.name: Stage Spotlight
prompts.text: Use a stage spotlight to isolate the subject with controlled falloff and performance drama.

prompts.name: Rainy Gray
prompts.text: Use muted rainy-day light with gray softness, diffused contrast, and reflective surfaces.

prompts.name: Divine Light
prompts.text: Use radiant divine light with soft bloom, gentle rays, and uplifting atmosphere.
